resume_data.raw_text:
Aaron Beavers
DevSecOps Engineer (AI Systems / LLM Infrastructure / Secure Automation)
CONTACT
West Des Moines, IA 50265 | 515-388-0539 | foamy125@gmail.com
GitHub: github.com/riatzukiza
SUMMARY
DevSecOps / platform engineer focused on AI systems: secure LLM gateways, credential/OAuth workflows, and
reproducible evaluation pipelines. ML-fluent (embeddings/clustering, eval design). 10+ years building production
softwarepre-agentic-AI;nowuseagentictoolingtoacceleratedeliverywithverification(tests,manifests,audittrails).
SKILLS
DevSecOps: Docker/Compose, Postgres, CI (CircleCI), cloud.gov / Cloud Foundry.
Security & reliability: OAuth PKCE, token auth, key rotation on rate limits, retries/timeouts, audit logs.
AI systems: OpenAI-compatible APIs, model-aware routing (Responses/Messages/chat), reasoning traces, embed-
dings + clustering, Chroma semantic recall.
Languages: TypeScript/Node.js, Python, Clojure, SQL, Ruby.
OPEN SOURCE EXPERIENCE
Open Hax Proxy — OpenAI-compatible multi-provider LLM gateway github.com/open-hax/proxx
- Builta3-providertoken-authenticatedproxywithprovider-scopedAPI-key/OAuthrotationonratelimitsand
cross-provider fallback for operational continuity.
- Implementedmodel-awarerouting+payloadtranslationbetweenOpenAIResponses,AnthropicMessages,and
Ollama; preserved reasoning traces; shipped a web console and Chroma-backed session recall.
- Reused the proxy + report stack in Mythloom, a worker-side anti-extractive resume analysis workbench.
Ussyverse / Battlebussy (contributor) — AI CTF platform github.com/shuv1337/battlebussy
- Shippedproductiondeployment/hardeningforGo+NATSJetStreamcontrolplane: multi-archDockerbuilds,
GHCR publish scripts, docker-compose prod stack, and OCI Terraform workflow/docs.
Shibboleth — Reproducible adversarial prompt-eval dataset pipeline github.com/octave-commons/shibboleth
- Authored a generative DSL + 7-stage pipeline with deterministic seeds, full provenance, leakage-proof splits
(sentence-transformers + HDBSCAN), and SHA-256 manifests/datasheets.
Gates of Aker / Fantasia — Simulation backend + observability UI github.com/octave-commons/gates-of-aker
- Maintained a tick-based Clojure simulation with WebSocket control plane + React UI; added WS E2E tests
and gate runtime modes (shadow/enforce/off).
WORK EXPERIENCE
Raft Technologies — Full Stack Engineer (Python/Django + React) Jul 2020 – Sep 2023
- Built 5-stage Celery pipelines for file ingestion (parse → validate → summarize → report → notify) with safe
failure modes and operational visibility.
- Integrated ClamAV REST scanning with retry/backoff + timeouts and persisted outcomes for auditability;
implemented robust file type + encoding detection.
- Supported Cypress E2E automation in CI to prevent regressions.
CloudApp — Full Stack Engineer (Ruby on Rails) Sep 2018 – Feb 2019
- Integrated a proprietary OCR service into a screenshot platform; implemented interactive OCR UX and hard-
ened key flows with automated tests.
Additional experience: 1brand(FullStackEngineer, 2019–2020); Birdseed(FullStackEngineer, 2019); Freelance
Software Engineer (2014–Present).
EDUCATION
Valley Springs High School — Diploma (2012)
WORK AUTHORIZATION
Authorized to work in the U.S. for any employer. Willing to relocate.
